rulings.Case Title: ABITSCH & ABITSCH, LLC VS. DARUKA WANIGATUNGA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 21, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT DARUKA WANIGATUNGA's Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs. Off Calendar. Notice of withdrawl of motion filed September 7, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ENVIRONMENT AND LAND MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GERALD R. GREENE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 21, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENT AND LAND MANAGEMENT, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny - 1) Procedurally improperly filed, CRC 3.1112 and CCP 1005.5; 2) Even if proper a triable issue of material fact re amount due and breach of warranty of habitability. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JESAMINE MAK VS. ROMAN MATUREL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 21, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT ROMAN MATUREL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend, fatally defective notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POETT LLC, VS. TAM M. VU et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 21, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFF POETT LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to November 27, 2012 for Bankruptcy status. = (501/REQ)
